decks.name: Bird ID: Eastern North America
decks.description: Identify 50 of the most common backyard, park, and roadside birds of eastern North America from photos. Details give the scientific name, key field marks, and how to separate lookalikes.

decks.name: Bird ID: Europe
decks.description: Identify 61 of Europe's best-known garden, park, farmland, and waterside birds from photos. Details give the scientific name, key field marks, and how to separate the classic confusion pairs.

decks.name: Bird ID: Western North America
decks.description: Identify 55 signature birds of the American West from photos, from coastal chaparral to desert and mountain pine forest. Details give the scientific name, key field marks, and lookalike tips.
